narrative:
Adams Township has 1,303 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
